prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e4075551`.
codex_response:
Implemented `e4075551` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: the four non-red singleton cells define the top, bottom, left, and right sides of a rectangle; the red `2` marks the center of an interior gray plus that connects toward those sides without overwriting the colored border. The Opus hint was used and kept because it matched the official examples; no `notes.md` or new primitive was needed.

Task package files: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e4075551/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e4075551/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e4075551/generator.py). The generator stays on-distribution by sampling sparse blank grids with exactly five singleton anchors, distinct side colors excluding `2` and `5`, unique extrema, and rectangle sizes/margins similar to the official family.

Validation passed: `4/4` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e4075551/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e4075551/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e4075551/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e4075551/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e4075551/previews/preview_03.png). I opened the first preview sheet and it looks visually consistent with the official task family.
